response.overview: Peru Infinito is a documentary born from a dream I shared with my friend and filmmaker, Alex Paul. Showcasing the best of Peru, sending a message of care and respect above all else for this country that gives us so much, was what we wanted to convey in this short film. We traveled for a year through more than nine regions. We covered thousands of kilometers, exploring the coast, mountains, and jungle of this country. It wasn't an easy task. We poured our hearts and souls into presenting Peru in the best possible light, and we sincerely hope you thoroughly enjoy the result.
response.title: Perú infinito
